problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: The key to What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? is Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating — specifically Atomic layer deposition — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
